Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Buried Path
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +29% (augmented)
Pack Size: +24% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +100% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 15(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Prefix Modifier "Thunderous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 19(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Lightning
{ Prefix Modifier "Penetrating" (Tier: 1) }
Monster Damage Penetrates 12(12-14)% Elemental Resistances
{ Suffix Modifier "of Buffering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters gain 18(12-25)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Unwavering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 72(70-79)% increased Ailment Threshold
Monsters have 64(60-69)% increased Stun Threshold
{ Suffix Modifier "Shocking" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Shocked Ground — Unscalable Value
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
